# The Standard Playbook — Full Reference

> High-performance coaching for elite entrepreneurs specializing in insurance agency growth, producer development, and sales training. Based in Fort Wayne, Indiana.

## Company Overview

The Standard Playbook is a coaching and technology company serving insurance agency owners, principal agents, and sales producers. The company provides structured coaching programs, masterminds, and a proprietary training app designed to build systematic, high-performing insurance agencies.

The business operates as Standard Playbook INC (DBA Agency Brain) and is led by Justin, Founder & Head Coach. The company is based in Fort Wayne, Indiana and serves clients nationwide.

Key metrics: 500+ entrepreneurs coached across 50+ industries, $500M+ in additional revenue generated by community members, 95% success rate.

Contact: Phone +1-260-515-1349, Email info@standardplaybook.com, Fort Wayne IN.

---

## Programs

### The Boardroom — Elite Agency Owner Mastermind
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/boardroom
Price: $299/month

The Boardroom is an exclusive mastermind for insurance agency owners who are ready to stop guessing and start leading. Members gain direct access to proven operators who have built what they are trying to build.

What's included:
- Monthly group mastermind calls with fellow agency owners and principal agents
- Peer accountability and strategy sessions
- Growth frameworks from $1M+ agency operators
- Face-to-face networking with high-performing agency leaders
- Access to proven systems for scaling insurance agencies

The Boardroom is designed for agency owners who want to surround themselves with people operating at a higher level. The investment is $299/month with no long-term contracts.

FAQ:
Q: Is this right for someone at my level?
A: If you're asking, you already know. The Boardroom is for agency owners at any stage who are committed to growth and willing to be challenged.

Q: How fast will I see results?
A: Results depend on implementation. The real question is how much has playing small already cost you.

---

### The Directive — Intensive 1:1 Implementation Coaching
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/directive

The Directive provides intensive, personalized coaching with direct implementation support. Work directly with Justin to develop custom strategies, execute systematically, and achieve breakthrough results.

What's included:
- One 2-hour private 1:1 coaching call per month
- Custom strategy development and deployment
- Weekly check-in protocols for accountability
- Monthly mission check-ins with course correction
- One 2-hour group Boardroom call per month
- 100 AI-graded calls per month (call scoring technology)
- Custom AI agent buildouts during sessions
- Custom reporting buildouts for your agency
- Process optimization

The Directive goes beyond traditional coaching by combining strategic guidance with hands-on technology implementation including AI tools and custom reporting.

---

### Partnership — White-Glove Business Partnership
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/partnership

The Partnership is the ultimate white-glove service for elite entrepreneurs who have outgrown traditional coaching. It creates a true business alliance with aligned incentives, direct access, and collaborative growth strategies.

Requirements: Typically $1M+ annual revenue, proven track record, commitment to significant growth.
Capacity: Limited to 12 Partnership clients at any time.

What's included:
- 24/7 direct phone and text access
- Emergency consultation availability
- Real-time decision support
- Joint venture opportunities
- Revenue-sharing with performance-based compensation
- Growth milestone rewards
- Dedicated account management
- Priority resource allocation
- Custom solution development
- Exclusive event invitations and VIP networking
- Joint business development and cross-promotion

Application process: Application → Interview → Custom proposal → Partnership launch.

FAQ:
Q: What are the requirements for Partnership consideration?
A: Partnership candidates typically generate $1M+ annually, have a proven track record of success, and are committed to significant growth.

Q: How is Partnership pricing structured?
A: Partnership agreements are custom-designed based on your business, goals, and growth potential. Pricing typically includes a base fee plus performance-based components.

Q: How many Partnership spots are available?
A: We limit Partnerships to 12 clients at any time to maintain the highest level of service and collaboration.

Q: What makes this different from high-end consulting?
A: Unlike consulting, Partnership means aligned incentives through revenue sharing and joint investments. We're invested partners with skin in the game.

---

### Sales Experience — 8-Week Sales Management Training
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/sales-experience

The Sales Experience is an 8-week intensive sales management training program designed to transform how agencies approach sales leadership, team management, and revenue generation.

The program includes:
- Sales Experience Dashboard with real-time analytics
- Team & Meeting Hub for structured team management
- Training Modules with built-in feedback loops
- Sales Process Card frameworks
- Accountability Metrics tracking
- Consequence Ladder system for performance management

The program addresses common agency problems: inconsistent sales processes, lack of accountability, managers who don't know how to coach, and teams that hit plateaus.

---

### Producer Power-Up — 6-Week Sales Transformation
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/producer-power-up
Price: $299/producer

The Producer Power-Up transforms insurance producers from reactive chaos to systematic execution in 42 days. This is a system, not a course — designed for agency owners who want unprecedented visibility into their producer's development.

Structure:
- 30 weekday video modules (3-5 minutes each, 10-15 minutes total daily commitment)
- Rolling enrollment: sign up by Friday, start Monday
- Weekly Discovery Stacks on Fridays (20-30 minutes)
- Daily action declarations and submissions
- 60-day full access to The Standard App (The Armory, Core 4 Tracker, 19 Stacking frameworks)
- Daily owner reports via email showing producer engagement and action commitments

The Core 4 System: Identity, Habits, Systems, Accountability, Results — five pillars that drive systematic execution.

After completion, producers can continue with Standard programs at a 25% lifetime discount.

FAQ:
Q: When does the challenge start?
A: Rolling enrollment. Sign up any producer by Friday and they begin the following Monday.

Q: How much time does this require daily?
A: 3-5 minutes for the video module, 10-15 minutes total including action declarations. Weekly Discovery Stack takes 20-30 minutes on Fridays.

Q: What if my producer misses a day?
A: All content remains accessible throughout the 6-week period. Producers can catch up, and you'll see completion status in daily reports.

Q: What access do I get as the owner?
A: Every daily action report via email, plus full PDF of each weekly Discovery Stack.

Q: What's included in the app access?
A: 60 days of The Standard App including The Armory (30 training modules), Core 4 Tracker (habit gamification), and all 19 Stacking frameworks.

---

### Owner Challenge — 6-Week Core 4 & Leadership Challenge
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/owner-challenge
Price: $299

The Owner Challenge is a 6-week identity-driven leadership transformation for insurance agency owners. Built on The Standard's Five Pillars: Identity, Habits, Systems, Accountability, and Results.

What's included:
- 30 weekday identity-driven micro-lessons (3 minutes daily)
- Core 4 Leadership Habit System with 60-day app access
- Executive identity templates and CEO SOPs
- Weekly leadership reinforcement (Friday Discovery-Stacks, Sunday Service emails)
- Lifetime access to all resources
- Credentials delivered within 48 hours; begin transformation first Sunday

The challenge addresses: repetitive operations misaligned with vision, energy depletion from identity misalignment, lack of systematic approaches, and disconnection from core leadership identity.

FAQ:
Q: When does my identity transformation begin?
A: Every Sunday. App credentials delivered within 48 hours of enrollment.

Q: How much time is required?
A: 3 minutes daily for micro-lessons, plus implementation time. Designed for busy agency owners.

---

## Technology

### Standard Call Scoring — AI-Powered Call Evaluation
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/callscoring

AI-powered call scoring that transforms sales coaching. Provides instant insights, consistent feedback, and accelerates team performance. Available as a standalone tool or included in Directive coaching (100 calls/month).

Pricing tiers: $299-499/month depending on volume.

### The Standard Playbook App
URL: https://standardplaybook.com/app

The proprietary training and accountability platform powering all Standard Playbook programs:
- The Armory: 30 structured training modules
- Core 4 Tracker: Habit gamification and streak tracking
- 19 Stacking Frameworks: Emotional processing and reflection tools
- Call scoring integration
- Role-play practice modules
- Performance analytics dashboard
